title: お花屋さんでの1ページ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I'm walking about the shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice Rice Shower watering flowers at a flower
shop.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Some for you, and you... Phew. That should do it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? What are you doing here? I-I mean,
welcome to the store...
choice_data_list: Forget me. What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's all my fault... I accidentally knocked over
a flower pot, and the shop manager tripped over
it and sprained an ankle...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm helping out today as an apology. I just hope I
don't make things worse...
choice_data_list: Want me to help water the flowers?

Want me to bring out more flowers from the
back?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What? Y-you want to help? If you're sure, then... I
would appreciate it a lot.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Aren't the flowers here just so beautiful? I think
the roses are especially pretty!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And when you water them, the petals sparkle like
diamonds... I can't help but be mesmerized by
them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and I chat happily as we water the
flowers in the shop.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you... Please be careful. Some of them
are pretty heavy...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
These flowers are so pretty... I wonder if we'd get
more customers if we displayed a bunch of them
out front? Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I eventually finish restocking the inventory. It was
tougher than I expected.
